calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 501 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Karina Herrera-Nava.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:55 am and concluding at 11:08 am.

Plaintiff Jane Lee, Trustee of the Lee Living Trust dated May 23, 1991 is present represented by Daniel Cheung, Esq. placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Karina Herrera-Nava is not present.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The Court takes Judicial Notice of Plaintiff's Trial Brief.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Jane Lee, Trustee of the Lee Living Trust dated May 23, 1991, and against Defendant Karina Herrera-Nava, as follows:

Plaintiff Jane Lee, Trustee of the Lee Living Trust dated May 23, 1991 is entitled to possession of the property located at 170 Wood Street #7, San Francisco, CA 94118, County of San Francisco.

The Lease is FORFEITED.
Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits. (D505)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Off Calendar
